nodes.title: Agent Skills
nodes.summary: Compatibility guidance for global Pi skills alongside CodeWiki-specific workflow skills.

nodes.title: Clients Overview
nodes.summary: User-facing workflow and status-surface expectations for codewiki.

nodes.title: Roadmap Surface
nodes.summary: TUI-first roadmap and inferred-delta experience for codewiki.

nodes.title: Status Panel
nodes.summary: Compact status-line and panel rules for codewiki.

nodes.title: Lexicon
nodes.summary: Shared CodeWiki vocabulary for agents, humans, tasks, and generated views.

nodes.title: Product
nodes.summary: Product intent and navigation for CodeWiki's users, stories, and surfaces.

nodes.title: Product Stories
nodes.summary: Core jobs and outcomes CodeWiki should support.

nodes.title: Product Surfaces
nodes.summary: Human and AI interaction surfaces for CodeWiki.

nodes.title: Product Users
nodes.summary: User classes CodeWiki must serve.

nodes.title: Extensions / Codewiki
nodes.summary: Pi package resources, extension commands/tools, packaged skills, status UI, and generated wiki templates for codewiki.

nodes.title: Context Memory Flow
nodes.summary: How CodeWiki chooses between session RAM, views, canonical knowledge, subagents, and optional bounded context tools.

nodes.title: Sanitation and Release Flow
nodes.summary: How CodeWiki keeps hot state small while using git for historical recovery.

nodes.title: System Overview
nodes.summary: Main runtime areas and ownership boundaries for CodeWiki.

nodes.title: Runtime Policy
nodes.summary: Policy boundary for codewiki runtime access in codewiki.

nodes.title: CodeWiki v2 Operating Model
nodes.summary: Agreed v2 model for canonical truth, views, memory use, subagents, heartbeat, optional runtime tools, and sanitation.

nodes.title: Initial documentation pattern note for codewiki
nodes.summary: Replace this seed with real external evidence or implementation findings.

nodes.title: Lock product intent in specs
nodes.summary: Turn codewiki intent into explicit product and system docs.

nodes.title: Map code ownership into spec hierarchy
nodes.summary: Refine the inferred boundary docs until wiki/system mirrors the repo's real ownership seams without creating doc sprawl.

nodes.title: Keep roadmap as freshest delta log
nodes.summary: Move drift and plan tracking into structured roadmap tasks instead of separate prose buckets.

nodes.title: Expose CodeWiki capability manifest and think-code boundary
nodes.summary: Define the typed CodeWiki capabilities that Pi runtimes such as think-code can call without bypassing .wiki semantics, including optional executor/fallback boundaries.

nodes.title: Split CodeWiki skills into focused outer and inner workflows
nodes.summary: Replace the single monolithic CodeWiki skill with a package-level router plus focused CodeWiki skills for planning, task execution, research, and verification.

nodes.title: Define CodeWiki outer planning loop
nodes.summary: Specify the automatic outer loop that turns user intent into wiki knowledge updates and roadmap tasks before task execution begins, with user approval only at decision checkpoints.

nodes.title: Define CodeWiki task execution inner loop
nodes.summary: Specify the automatic per-task loop that uses think-code context packets, implementation, local checks, fresh verification, and evidence before closure without requiring user-triggered verification commands.

nodes.title: Model research evidence as support for wiki knowledge
nodes.summary: Separate external/source research from task execution so research evidence supports `.wiki/knowledge` claims rather than becoming part of every implementation loop.

nodes.title: Add automatic fresh-context verifier agent workflow
nodes.summary: Design and implement an automatic verifier stage that spawns a read-only agent when task execution reaches verification, while retaining a manual command only as an override/debug entrypoint.

nodes.title: Add CodeWiki architecture review workflow adapted from deep-module heuristics
nodes.summary: Adapt deep-module and shared-language architecture review ideas into a `.wiki`-aware workflow for finding seams, locality problems, and roadmap-worthy refactors.

nodes.title: Record curated global agent skills decision
nodes.summary: Document which general engineering skills should be installed or adapted globally for Pi without conflicting with CodeWiki-specific workflows.

nodes.title: Reduce canonical surface and projection write amplification
nodes.summary: Projection firewall first slice completed: canonical/generated contract documented and refresh=false paths now avoid projection locks/rebuilds where safe.

nodes.title: Decouple closed-task retention from projection rebuild
nodes.summary: Closed-task retention no longer depends on generated projection rebuilds; refresh=false close path preserves archive retention.

nodes.title: Capture CodeWiki v2 operating model and roadmap
nodes.summary: CodeWiki v2 decisions are now durable wiki knowledge and mapped to executable roadmap tasks.

nodes.title: Implement v2 wiki layout and migration
nodes.summary: V2 layout compatibility is implemented: `.wiki/views/**` is generated alongside legacy read models and bootstrap/rebuild understand the v2 views root.

nodes.title: Bake product split and lexicon into templates
nodes.summary: Starter templates now include the v2 product split and shared lexicon, with smoke coverage for the new files.

nodes.title: Render architecture graph in status panel
nodes.summary: Update the CodeWiki status panel to render the generated architecture view and show component or flow details when selected.

nodes.title: Implement context memory policy in skills and loops
nodes.summary: Teach agents when to use session RAM, views, canonical docs, subagents, and ThinkCode so default workflows minimize repeated token load.

nodes.title: View schema generator for status queue drift and briefs
nodes.summary: Define and generate the small, revisioned read models agents and UI consume for status, roadmap queue, task context, drift, product brief, system architecture, and recent evidence.

nodes.title: Architecture manifest and Mermaid view generator
nodes.summary: Add canonical system architecture graph support with component and flow docs, then generate agent-readable and Mermaid architecture views from it.

nodes.title: Subagent JSON worker contracts
nodes.summary: Define and implement compact JSON contracts for verifier, researcher, planner, architecture reviewer, and view auditor subagents.

nodes.title: Heartbeat modes budgets and stop conditions
nodes.summary: Add bounded observe, maintain, and work heartbeat modes that use views, subagents, and canonical writes safely.

nodes.title: ThinkCode query executor integration
nodes.summary: Use ThinkCode for ad hoc programmatic context creation, view validation, graph checks, and staged edits without making it CodeWiki's memory layer.

nodes.title: Sanitation checkpoints and git history policy
nodes.summary: Keep hot wiki state small by relying on git for full history and storing only compact semantic archives and release checkpoints.

nodes.title: Audit read model wording in README skills and tools
nodes.summary: Align public package language so generated read models are called views and source-of-truth files are called canonical truth.

nodes.title: Decouple ThinkCode from CodeWiki memory policy
nodes.summary: Remove wording that frames ThinkCode as an enforced CodeWiki runtime and describe it only as optional compatible tooling.
